name: Numerical reasoning from context
response:
The projected revenue growth from 2023 to 2024 is 32.3%. This can be calculated as follows:

\[ \text{Projected Growth Percentage} = \left( \frac{\text{Projected 2024 Revenue} - \text{2023 Revenue}}{\text{2023 Revenue}} \right) \times 100 \]

\[ \text{Projected 2024 Revenue} = \$32M \]
\[ \text{2023 Revenue} = \$18.2M \]

\[ \text{Projected Growth Percentage} = \left( \frac{32 - 18.2}{18.2} \right) \times 100 = 32.3\% \]
